---
title: "Papermill"
description: "Batch notebook execution"
---

[Papermill](https://papermill.readthedocs.io/) enables parameterized notebook execution, useful for running the same analysis across multiple datasets or parameter configurations.

## Basic Usage

```bash
papermill templates/fitting.ipynb output.ipynb \
  -p dataset_path "data/experiment1.h5" \
  -p model_name "CMR"
```

## Batch Processing

*Coming soon: batch processing examples*
